route_reference.summary: Correct stale Tainan station-pair labels using official incident and route-chainage references. Operating mileage is intentionally excluded from this reference.
sources: TRA crossing incident tables (四維路 K351+802 listed as 永康~大橋 in 113 年資料)
Official Tainan undergrounding project chainage anchors (大橋南端 K355+300, 臺南站 UK357+800)

四維路
properties.station_pair_reference_note: Official TRA incident data for 四維路平交道 (K351+802) lists the operational section as 永康~大橋.

properties.name: 實踐路(舊名大光路)
properties.station_pair_reference_note: Crossings between K355+300 and UK357+800 are treated as the 大橋-臺南 operational segment instead of the stale 永康-台南 query label.
properties.station_route_reference_note: Uses official Tainan route-chainage anchors for the Daqiao south end and Tainan station reference point.

properties.station_route_reference_note: Uses official Tainan route-chainage anchors for the Daqiao south end and Tainan station reference point.
